STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.descriptio: Whenever you play 3 Attacks during your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.flavor: The Heartwood Ranger's staff. It was gifted to her by an ancient tree of the Silvan Woods when she swore her oath to defend the denizens of the forest.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.title: Heartwood Staff
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.description:
On pickup, lose 10 max HP.
Card rewards now may include [gold]Necrobinder[/gold] cards.
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.flavor: A dark deal was made with the goddess of Death and Revenge. A deal the Heartwood Ranger believes will help her save the world.
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.title: Dark Contract
